features: Gel formula for easy application on skin

description: Product Description Gillette Clear Gel Sport Triumph is an antiperspirant that gives you a powerful 48-hour sweat protection. It has a precision engineered formula which keep you fresh all day. Plus, Gillette Clear Gel goes on clear and stays on clear - giving you invisible sweat protection. After all, this is the best a man can get.
